entry.title: Re: New: Tags in SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation
entry.content:
Hello 
How to assign tags to requirement using requirement template file please ?
It works partially :

- but not assigned to the requirement where they are supposed to --> KO

So I have a collection of created tags but not assigned to the requirement that I mentioned in the requirement template creation file 😕

I tried to update the already existing requirements but no more success.

Any help please ?

thanks

Helinna

entry.title: Weighting group total higher than 1
entry.content:
I have a scenario where i want to create a custom weighting group that goes past 1.00 for my total. It would be month 12 is .40, month 11 is .40, and month 10 is .40. It would be the same as the screenshot, but we need growth and have no old material to use referencing; material number has not changed in many years. 

Is this possible? We can't move off a weighted moving average W forecast model, so seasonal models and trend models are not an option at this time.

entry.title: Re: Gts commodity code transfer to S4
entry.content: Hello Hassett_Lee, So, if you see entries when field PROCESS is blank, these are the entries that the COMCO report is supposed to process. Have you done a debug?

same data are in TABAS table.

entry.title: Re: Deletion of sort sequence and manual storage bins Sorting for an activity in activity area

you are right with your steps we can select what we can delete particularly.

entry.title: UB document that does not record consumption
entry.content: We use UB purchase orders to move items from hubs to spokes. When those go materials go to other plants that are not designated replenishment paths, we want SAP to ignore the consumption all together in the corrected total, not just record it in unplanned consumption. We are overbuying due to operational issues and need to see if a customized version of UB purchase orders can ignore all consumption records for forecasting in the plant that sent the material. Is there a way to do this, and would the Consumption field KZVBR in EKPO be the field or setting that drives that?

entry.title: Re: Does anyone know where I can download compass example...
entry.content: Very good tip about Best Bike Model, found. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Check by Tax Number
entry.content: Above steps not workable ......

entry.title: Issue with Product Migration Object: Errors During Preparation Phase
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on migrating the Product object using a migration object, and I encounter the following errors during the Preparation phase. Up until this stage, everything works smoothly.

Errors Encountered:

  1. System error during the function module call in the sender system
    Message Class: DMC_RT_MSG
    Message Number: 203

  2. System error (Portion 0000000001, Conversion object Z_PRODUCT_M0U around 123713)
    Message Class: DMC_RT_MSG
    Message Number: 39

  3. _IT_IO_S_MBEW: Overwrite error: Column at serialization 10, actual column 11 (Conversion object Z_PRODUCT_M0U)
    Message Class: DMC_RT_MSG
    Message Number: 41

Context:
The migration object has been set up and executed successfully up to this phase. These errors occur during the Preparation stage of the migration process.

Could you please advise if there are any additional configurations or checks required to resolve these errors? Are there any specific areas (e.g., source system configurations, mapping rules, or settings in the migration cockpit) that I should revisit?

Any insights or suggestions would be highly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Adding new properties for Business Partner Group
entry.content:
Hello,

 

You define the properties in Administration -> Setup -> Business Partners -> Business Partner Properties.

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Using Nio Protocol in Tomcat
entry.content:
I did check the documentation and it seems that this crucial information is missing for 2205 version: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE/eed845124da0491e875df8139c4e6e8c/f18f6a711d07462b80137df6ed533eee.html?locale=en-US#patch-2205-24 . However if you check the same documentation for 2211 version (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/75d4c3895cb346008545900bffe851ce/145c323e1d3e4fee8f69bafc4efe448a.html?locale=en-US) you will notice that you should use

protocol="HTTP/1.1"

entry.title: Unsupported evaluation Error
entry.content:
Helle everyone,

I created a visibility condition to hide a field, in the execution the field in hidden but the error appear in the mobile screen. could any one have explanation?
thank you

entry.title: Re: Order....: 1000820634 Residence time 1 not exceeded
entry.content:
Message no. BA235 - Following an error in CO78

Check in transaction SARA/CO78 -> Button Customizing -> Archiving Object-Specific Customizing -> Technical Settings

- Double-click the "Logical File Name Definition, Cross-Client" and find the logical file ARCHIVE_DATA_FILE in transaction FILE, then double click it, you can find the Logical Path is:

- Then find and click the Logical Path ARCHIVE_GLOBAL_PATH in the tree "Logical Path Definition" -> double click "Assignment of Physical Paths to Logical Path":

- Here you can find the setting of physical path in this case is:
Syntax group    WINDOWS NT Microsoft Windows NT
Physical path   <P=DIR_GLOBAL>/<FILENAME>

The F1 help (Performance Assistant) for "Physical path" is defined as below:

Examples

  • Local directory for temporary files under Windows NT:

D:\GLOBAL\ARCHIVE\<PARAM_1>\<FILENAME>

  • Local directory for temporary files under DOS:

C:\TMP\<FILENAME>

  • Local directory for temporary files under UNIX:

/usr/<SYSID>/local/tmp/<CLIENT>/<FILENAME>

The error message BA235 here is caused by the directory separator '/'.

entry.title: Re: List Report Controller Extension - custom button plus...
entry.content:
I think you two js files and use for your action like:

          "barcodeSearch": {
            "id": "barcodeSearch",
            "text": "Barcode Search",
            "press": "... .equipbcodelr.ext.controller.ListReportActionExt.scanMe",
            "requiresSelection": false
          },

So one file for your controller extension and one for the press action.

Also i recommend to do everything (creating custom action, creating controller extension) with the Fiori tools, so you dont have to worry about the details here.

entry.title: Re: [SAP Build Apps] how to disable dropdown field and change component style when disabled
entry.content:
For disabling the input field I do not know.

For changing colors based on disabled field, you can create a local palette color inside the input field and based on a formula for "self.disabled" and then use that to color parts of the input field. I could get it to work on sub components, and the whole mechanism is not so straightforward, but I was able to change the background or shadow of the input field.

entry.title: Re: Consuming a released event of an unreleased RAP BO (h...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you require additional standard events delivered by SAP or C1-released, you can raise your request via this campaign in the customer influence portal. 

Best regards, Bernd

entry.title: Re: Continous innovation compatability Integration pack
entry.content: You can use this help page to check which integration pack patch version is compatible with Commerce patch version: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_INTEGRATIONS/58d2065698d847efaa44e08c3556ae96/9a606e25695c4c9b95be4f14c2edeaae.html?locale=en-US&version=2211

entry.title: Re: Teams Management, Data Privileges and Data Locks in SAP PaPM Cloud - Universal Model
entry.content:
Hi,
Thanks for this great and detailed description! 
I have one question: does that mean that for each team I would like to create in your example Writer Team A, - B, Reader Team A, -B. There needs to be a separate role collection?

Background: We have the case that e.g., Writer Team A & Writer Team B have overall the same roles (in BTP subaccount), but just for specific data (managed with the CPE-UM-teams). I was hoping to keep the BTP role collections "clean" and then do the specific assignments only in CPE-UM.

Thanks for your support!
Best regards,
Rike

entry.title: Re: Communication Systems - It's not avaible in Fiori Lau...
entry.content:
Hi Brenomatias,

according to the screenshot it seems that your user is missing the administrator role which includes the "Communication System" app. 

Could you try by either logon with the administrator role or assign a role based on the template "SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR" to your user.

entry.title: Re: Add Button in Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello,

Your code is not adding the button in the form. You need to write the code to catch the event of the application corresponding to the sales order form loading and then create the button on it.

There is plenty of samples in the SDK documentation on how to do this.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Order....: 1000820634 Residence time 1 not exceeded
entry.content: Are you facing an error here, or are you sharing additional information with the community?

entry.title: Re: [SAP Build Apps] how to disable dropdown field and change component style when disabled
entry.content:
Hi Dan,

Thanks for the help. I was able to change the font color inside the input field when disabling/enabling the field using a formula. This made me realize we can also do formulas in styles and layouts! (sadly, it is not an option for background color)

As for my first question, looks like a workaround that I can do is to just create two components inside the container, a dropdown field and a disabled input field, then switch the visibility to show the dropdown field when enabled, and the input field when disabled

entry.title: SAP MaxAttention IWS 'SAP S/4HANA for Artificial Intelligence' (March 4, 2025)
entry.content:
Virtual

Agenda

March 4, 2025

Dear Valued Customer,

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop ‘SAP S4/HANA for Artificial Intelligence’ taking place virtually on March 4, 2025. Please find the current agenda here.

Join us for an exclusive Innovation Workshop, where we will explore the advanced capabilities of SAP S/4HANA for Machine Learning (ML) and Artificial Intelligence (AI). This session will showcase how SAP S/4HANA embedded ML algorithms can optimize existing business processes, driving efficiency, intelligence, and innovation at scale.

This workshop provides a deep dive into SAP S/4HANA’s potential as a robust ML/AI platform. We will examine the strategic impact of AI in reshaping the digital core, unlocking new opportunities for businesses to stay competitive in an evolving landscape.

A key focus will be on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with the SAP S/4HANA Vector Engine, illustrating how it enhances decision-making processes and equips organizations to thrive in dynamic, data-driven environments. Additionally, we will demonstrate how SAP HANA Graph Engine can be leveraged for DB Load Analysis, providing IT teams with deeper insights to optimize system performance and resource utilization.

Throughout the session, we will present use cases that showcase practical applications of AI and ML in SAP environments.

Furthermore, we will introduce our comprehensive SAP MaxAttention service portfolio for AI, designed to help customers explore, innovate, and implement AI capabilities effectively. SAP MaxAttention expert guidance and tailored services will support your journey toward an intelligent enterprise.

Our Workshops

These sessions and workshop series focus on a specific topic and the purpose is to enable our customers to understand the product portfolio and innovative technologies of SAP in order to drive adoption and consumption. As specifically now, it is more important than ever to help companies to be successful and to respond to changing markets by transforming into intelligent enterprises in the experience economy.

Important

Please note that the 'Attend' button which can be found within this blog post does not serve as a formal registration for the event.

To officially register, please reach out to me, paul.schropp@sap.com and I will ensure that your registration is properly processed.

We look forward to having you join us for our upcoming events and thank you for your understanding!

Your feedback

Feel free to share your feedback and thoughts in the comment section below.

entry.title: Re: Sap.Data.SQLAnywhere.SAException (0x80004005): Procedure 'Describe' not found
entry.content: As an update - SELECT c.column_name AS 'Name', c.base_type_str AS 'Type', c.nulls AS 'Nulls', c.`default` AS 'Default' FROM systabcol c KEY JOIN systab t ON t.table_name = 'MyTable' does the same thing. Any idea, though, how to determine if as default value is user or computed? Thanks

entry.title: Code Jam in Rotkreuz, Switzerland
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, 

We are interested and would be looking forward to hosting an SAP CodeJam in our offices in Rotkreuz, ZG. Located in walking distance of public transportation and very accessible.

  • Location: Gambit-Consulting office in Rotkreuz, Switzerland
  • Topics in our scope:
    • With SAP Build, Create Apps, Processes, and Business Sites Without Coding
      or
    • ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
      or
    • Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
  • Possible dates:
    • Rather flexible, preferably before July

An event with free coffee, croissants, and a business lunch to foster connections, get your feet wet in a new SAP topic and inspire productivity.

Looking forward to your response
Harry

ShashanK Singor

entry.title: Can we transport Sustainability control tower object and Role collections from DEV to QA Sub account
entry.content:

Can we use the same route for transporting Sustainability control tower role collections? If so how we can proceed?

Regards,

Upender.

entry.title: Re: The SAP Extended Warehouse Management FAQ Series: The ABAP Test Cockpit Checks for SAP EWM
entry.content: Will there be an update of the Checks to support new Syntax?  Example /SCWM/CL_ATC_DELIVERY_QUERY will not detect setting of parameters using inline declarations  instead of many lines of value assignements  .  It is annoying to get many many wrong findings for this useful Check.  Or do i miss any update?  Fr note 3262092 ican't find a new Version.

entry.title: Re: Copy ACTUALSQTYPRIORYEAR values are shifted by 10 weeks
entry.content:
Thank you BBRI. 

Here is the screenshot of the copy operator

'However more likely: From your last screenshot actually it looks that your planning area is using a customized time profile (as fiscal week isn't in the standard profile). '

You are right and my mistake I posted the screenshot of the IBP1 Model. Here is our Time Profile

and the Time Attributes of the Planning Level

I guess that in the example (screenshot) you posted it was a simple copy operator ...?

Anything regarding our Time Profile I would expect that the standard KF Prior Year will have the same impact and still the shifting of the quantities and dates are correct for this one. Then why a copy of this one into another would shift the figures by 10 weeks?

entry.title: Re: Issue with mbt build in Newly Created CAP Project on...

I tried executing that command. Still the folder is not getting created.
Giving the following logs when executed,

user: llcapm $ cds build --production
building project [/home/user/projects/llcapm], clean [true]
cds-dk [8.6.1], cds [8.7.1], compiler [5.7.4], home [/home/user/projects/llcapm/node_modules/@sap/cds]

{
build: {
target: 'gen',
tasks: [
{ for: 'nodejs', src: 'srv', options: { model: ['db', 'srv', 'app'] }}
]
}
}

done > wrote output to:
gen/srv/package-lock.json
gen/srv/package.json
gen/srv/srv/csn.json
gen/srv/srv/odata/v4/CatalogService.xml

build completed in 180 ms

entry.title: Re: Uploading Proxy to API Management via Rest API
entry.content: Wow I just came into the same problem and ended up in this post. Thanks a lot, my friend, because you just solved my problem. But it's sad to see your post from FIVE YEARS AGO and see that the documentation in SAP Business Accelerator Hub IS STILL WRONG!

entry.title: Re: Is there a method / what are steps to move from using...
entry.content:
Attached is a 20-year old example script.

 

#!/bin/sh

echo "This script migrates ASE RSSD to ASA eRSSD";

# This function expects two parameters:
#	table_name
#	a select statement with order by using primary key
migrate()
{
	echo "Truncating target table $1...";
	echo "Truncating target table $1..." >> $0.out;
	(echo "truncate table $1" ; echo go ) | $SYBASE/$SYBASE_OCS/bin/isql -U dbo -P dbo -S $eRSSDServer
	echo "Copying table $1 from ${ASEServer}.$ASEdb to $eRSSDServer...";
	echo "Copying table $1 from ${ASEServer}.$ASEdb to $eRSSDServer..." >> $0.out;
	$SYBASE/$SYBASE_REP/bin/rs_subcmp -S $ASEServer -s $eRSSDServer -c "$2" -t dbo.$1 -U $ASEuser -u dbo -p dbo -D $ASEdb -n 0 -r $ASEpwdParam
	if [ "$?" = 1 ]
	then
		echo "Command failed for $1";
		echo "Command failed for $1" >> $0.out;
		echo -n "$SYBASE/$SYBASE_REP/bin/rs_subcmp -S $ASEServer -s $eRSSDServer -c \"";
		echo -n "$2";
		echo "\" -t dbo.$1 -U $ASEuser -u dbo -p dbo -D $ASEdb -n 0 -r $ASEpwdParam";
		echo -n "$SYBASE/$SYBASE_REP/bin/rs_subcmp -S $ASEServer -s $eRSSDServer -c \"" >> $0.out;
		echo -n "$2" >> $0.out;
		echo "\" -t dbo.$1 -U $ASEuser -u dbo -p dbo -D $ASEdb -n 0 -r $ASEpwdParam" >> $0.out;
		exit 1;
	fi
}

get_input()
{
	echo " ";
	echo -n "Please enter the ASE RSSD server name: ";
	read ASEServer;
	echo -n "Please enter the ASE RSSD db name: ";
	read ASEdb;
	echo -n "Please enter the ASE user name: " 
	read ASEuser;
	echo -n "Please enter the ASE user password: "
	read ASEpwd;
	echo -n "Please enter the ASA eRSSD server name: ";
	read eRSSDServer;

	echo " "
	echo "ASE RSSD server name: $ASEServer";
	echo "ASE RSSD db name: $ASEdb";
	echo "ASE user name: $ASEuser";
	echo "ASE user password: $ASEpwd";
	echo "ASA eRSSD server name: $eRSSDServer";
	echo -n "Is the information correct? [y/n/q]";
	read correct;
}

get_input;
while [ "$correct" != "y" ]
do
	if [ "$correct" = "q" ]
	then
		exit 0;
	fi
	get_input;
done

echo "ASE RSSD server name: $ASEServer" >> $0.out;
echo "ASE RSSD db name: $ASEdb" >> $0.out;
echo "ASE user name: $ASEuser" >> $0.out;
echo "ASE user password: $ASEpwd" >> $0.out;
echo "ASA eRSSD server name: $eRSSDServer" >> $0.out;

if [ $ASEpwd ]
then
	ASEpwdParam="-P $ASEpwd";
else
	ASEpwdParam="";
fi

# Now migrate each table
migrate rs_classes "select * from rs_classes order by classname, classtype";
migrate rs_columns "select * from rs_columns order by objid, colname";
migrate rs_config "select * from rs_config order by optionname, objid";
migrate rs_debugconfig "select * from rs_debugconfig order by optionname, objid";
migrate rs_datatype "select * from rs_datatype order by dtname";
migrate rs_databases "select * from rs_databases order by ltype, dsname, dbname";
migrate rs_diskaffinity "select * from rs_diskaffinity order by dbid_or_siteid";
migrate	rs_diskpartitions "select * from rs_diskpartitions order by logical_name"
migrate rs_erroractions "select * from rs_erroractions order by ds_errorid, errorclassid";
migrate rs_functions "select * from rs_functions order by funcname, objid";
migrate rs_ids "select * from rs_ids order by objtype";
migrate rs_idnames "select * from rs_idnames order by name1, name2, ltype";

migrate rs_locater "select * from rs_locater order by sender, type";
migrate rs_maintusers "select * from rs_maintusers order by destid";
migrate rs_objects "select * from rs_objects order by objname";
migrate rs_oqid "select * from rs_oqid order by origin_site_id, q_number, q_type";
migrate rs_queues "select * from rs_queues order by number, type";
migrate rs_exceptshdr "select * from rs_exceptshdr order by sys_trans_id";
migrate rs_exceptscmd "select * from rs_exceptscmd order by cmd_id";
migrate rs_exceptslast "select * from rs_exceptslast order by error_db, origin";
migrate rs_repdbs "select * from rs_repdbs order by dbid";
migrate rs_routes "select * from rs_routes order by dest_rsid, source_rsid";
migrate rs_rules "select * from rs_rules order by subid, colnum";
migrate rs_segments "select * from rs_segments order by partition_id, partition_offset";
migrate rs_sites "select * from rs_sites order by id";
migrate rs_funcstrings "select * from rs_funcstrings order by classid, funcid, name";
migrate rs_subscriptions "select * from rs_subscriptions order by subid";
migrate rs_systext "select * from rs_systext order by parentid, texttype, sequence";
migrate rs_translation "select * from rs_translation order by classid, source_dtid";
migrate rs_users "select * from rs_users order by username";
migrate rs_repobjs "select * from rs_repobjs order by objid, dbid";
migrate rs_queuemsg "select * from rs_queuemsg order by q_number, q_type, q_seg, q_blk, q_row";
migrate rs_queuemsgtxt "select * from rs_queuemsgtxt order by q_number, q_type, q_seg, q_blk, q_row, q_seq";
migrate rs_recovery "select * from rs_recovery order by id";
migrate rs_version "select * from rs_version order by siteid";
migrate rs_routeversions "select * from rs_routeversions order by dest_rsid, source_rsid";
migrate rs_articles "select * from rs_articles order by articlename, pubid";
migrate rs_publications "select * from rs_publications order by pubname, pdbid";
migrate rs_whereclauses "select * from rs_whereclauses order by wclauseid";
migrate rs_statcounters "select * from rs_statcounters order by counter_id";
migrate rs_statdetail "select * from rs_statdetail order by run_id, instance_id, instance_val, counter_id";
migrate rs_statrun "select * from rs_statrun order by run_id";
migrate rs_dbreps "select * from rs_dbreps order by dbid, dbrepname";
migrate rs_dbsubsets "select * from rs_dbsubsets order by dbrepid, type, owner, name";
migrate rs_lastcommit "select * from rs_lastcommit order by origin";
migrate rs_threads "select * from rs_threads order by id";

 

This is provided without any warranties.  As this is an older example, you will probably have to alter it to ensure all objects are migrated correctly.

entry.title: Re: Launching the RISE with SAP Methodology Dashboard for Your SAP Transformation Journey
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

Is there a slide deck or white paper available for customers?

entry.title: User in People Picker of Manage workflow application
entry.content:
How to make users available in People picker of Manage workflow application?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: User in People Picker of Manage workflow application
entry.content:
1. Only users that have a manager role assigned will be displayed as possible approvers of a workflow in the manage workflow Apps. For example, to get the approvers in the people picker for 'Manage workflows for Purchase order' application then the approver should have the roles "Manager (SAP_BR_MANAGER)" , "Purchasing Manager (SAP_BR_PURCHASING_MANAGER)" assigned to the profile.  
  2. Create a valid work agreement for the worker and maintain supervisor/manager details through the app "Manage Workforce" for the corresponding work agreement.

entry.title: Introduction to SAP S/4HANA Advanced Intercompany Sales
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Advanced Intercompany Sales is a robust solution designed to streamline and optimize the sales processes between affiliated companies within a corporate group. This functionality is particularly useful for organizations where a local sales office sells products to external customers, but the goods are delivered directly from a producing company or a central warehouse. The process ensures seamless integration between sales, procurement, delivery, and billing operations, enabling efficient intercompany transactions.

Business Process Overview

 

The Advanced Intercompany Sales process involves the following key steps:

  1. Sales Order Creation: A standard sales order is created by the selling company for an external customer. The system automatically identifies if the delivering plant belongs to a different company code, making the order relevant for intercompany processing.
  2. Intercompany Purchase Order: Upon saving the sales order, the system generates an intercompany purchase order in the selling company. This purchase order is directed to the delivering company, which is responsible for supplying the goods.
  3. Intercompany Sales Order: The delivering company receives the purchase order and creates an intercompany sales order. This order is used to manage the internal transaction between the delivering company and the selling company.
  4. Delivery and Goods Movement: The delivering company processes the outbound delivery and ships the goods directly to the external customer. The system manages the goods movements, including the transfer of goods into and out of stock in transit, ensuring accurate inventory tracking.
  5. Billing: Two types of invoices are generated:
    • Customer Invoice: The selling company bills the external customer for the goods delivered.
    • Intercompany Customer Invoice: The delivering company bills the selling company for the intercompany transaction.
  6. Invoice Verification: The intercompany supplier invoice is verified against the intercompany customer invoice to ensure accuracy and compliance.

Key Features

  • Real-Time Integration: The process is fully integrated into the SAP S/4HANA value chain monitoring framework, allowing real-time tracking and monitoring of each step.
  • Valuated Stock in Transit: The system uses valuated stock in transit to manage the transfer of goods between affiliated companies, ensuring accurate financial reporting and inventory management.
  • Automated Workflows: Many steps, such as the creation of intercompany purchase orders and sales orders, are automated, reducing manual effort and minimizing errors.

Setup Steps

To enable Advanced Intercompany Sales in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502, the following setup steps are required:

  1. Enable the Process: Activate the Advanced Intercompany Sales process (scope item 5D2) through expert configuration. This involves enabling specific pre-delivered configurations.
  2. Assign Purchasing Organization and Group: Assign a purchasing organization and purchasing group to the sales organization of the intercompany sales order.
  3. Configure Pricing: Set up pricing independently for the delivering and selling companies. This includes defining pricing procedures and condition types for internal and external customers.
  4. Define Transfer of Control Dates: Configure the internal and external transfer of control dates to manage the timing of goods movements and revenue recognition.
  5. Monitor Value Chains: Use the Monitor Value Chains app to orchestrate and monitor each step of the intercompany sales process.

Analyzing the Process

To analyze and resolve issues in the Advanced Intercompany Sales process, you can use the following tools:

  • Sales Order Fulfillment - Analyze and Resolve Issues App: This app helps identify and resolve issues that may impede the fulfillment of sales orders. It provides insights into critical stages of the process and facilitates collaboration with relevant contacts.
  • Monitor Value Chains App: This app offers a comprehensive view of the entire intercompany sales process, allowing you to track the status of sales orders, deliveries, and invoices.

Conclusion

SAP S/4HANA Advanced Intercompany Sales provides a comprehensive solution for managing complex intercompany sales processes. By automating key steps and integrating them into a unified framework, it enhances efficiency, accuracy, and visibility across the supply chain. Proper setup and configuration, along with the use of analytical tools, ensure smooth operation and timely resolution of any issues that may arise.

entry.title: Is there any way for a single user to execute data actions in parallel?
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We built a debt model, and this model has complex data actions that run for many years, until the end of the debt contracts, because of this complexity the execution of these contracts takes a long time, so we thought about the possibility of parallelizing the execution of contracts by company or by type, I didn't find anything about parallelism of Data Actions, is there any possibility to parallelize the execution from a single user?

entry.title: Re: How to trigger RAP Event in Unmanaged Scenario ?
entry.content: Technically you can raise an event without touching the underlying RAP event at all.

entry.title: Re: How to trigger RAP Event in Unmanaged Scenario ?
entry.content:
Technically you can raise an event without touching the underlying RAP event at all.

You can define your own RAP object (BDEF etc.) with a class-method that wraps raising your own event. This class-method can be called from anywhere, obviously.
You would want to raise the event around the save of the object: note that the event is actually send with the COMMIT (and reversed on ROLLBACK), so you are somewhat flexible where you can raise it, you can do it well before the actual save happens (this may be necessary depending on the exit you use to raise the event).

entry.title: Re: Copy ACTUALSQTYPRIORYEAR values are shifted by 10 weeks
entry.content:
Hi Daniel 

Thanks for your suggestions. I can get the results by using the copy operator from the Actuals Key Figure. All I had to do was use the Period Shift and it would be equivalent but easier than the Prior Year Key Figure. You might say, I have a solution then I have no longer a problem. I still choose to post the question because I couldnt/cant find a reason why using the copy from Prior Year to the Stored KF the values are shifted by 10 weeks and are not a time phased mirror. As shown on my excel screenshot Prior Year is shifted as expected but the Stored KF which is a copy of the former is not 

 

I wonder if its anything mentioned by BBRI

Thank you both for taking the time and any other thoughts comments on this 

Best regards

Roberto

entry.title: Recorded Employee Time Report Shows all the Time Recording
entry.content:
Upon executing the 'Recorded Employee Times' report, it shows incorrect values for Employee Recorded Time. For example, the Employee Times section displays X hours, but the report shows Y hours instead.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Recorded Employee Time Report Shows all the Time Reco...
entry.content:
You can make the Active time recordings visible and remove the Canceled time recordings in the report's view by following the below steps:

  1. Go to Time Administration work center
  2. Go to Reports view
  3. Find the report Recorded Employee Times
  4. Open the report
  5. Select the link to start the report
  6. In the Selection tab, provide the Employee ID and Key Date and apply
  7. In the View tab, tick mark the required fields. Select the + button in the Row Selection and from the box window, select Status
  8. Select Apply
  9. In the Selection Tab on the top left, see the Status Field is now available and the Column Status is also visible in the report screen itself
  10. The time recordings are now separated with Active and Canceled
  11. In the Status field, select the dropdown box and select Active from the options, then Apply

Now the Canceled times have been removed and only Active ones are visible.

entry.title: Re: Problem with ATP check in production
entry.content:
The availability overview from comp. ATP check inside CO02 (info how to get there in my first answer) would give a bit more info. Shows the actual ATP result with the req. from the current prod. order as 'simulated requirements'.

Anyway: Personally I assume it's a bug, affecting how ATP sees reservations with negative quantity ('coproducts'). I suggest to send a ticket to SAP support after searching for notes. (I didnt find a matching note  in SAP Support Portal.)

entry.title: Re: Askb
entry.content:
Seems okay

" ALLWAYS UPDATE TABAS, otherwise RAABST01 and RAJABS00 don't work

entry.title: Customer Info Records – VD51/52/53 / Fiori App F2499
entry.content:
Hi guys,

In the SAP GUI additional customer materials can be created with field entries like "Customer material number" + "Customer description" (--> Customer info records / T-code VD51/52/53). The customer description field is not declared as a mandatory field in the SAP GUI.

Fiori; Field Control

Compared with the corresponding Fiori App F2499 I would now assume that the field "Customer description of material" is also here an optional field. But, with the Fiori App the customer material description is declared as  mandatory. Is there a special reason for this? How can the settings be adjusted?

Thank you.

entry.title: BUSINESS ROUND EVENT
entry.content:
A SAP COMMUNITY CWB esta apoiando e participará do mais famoso encontro de networking de Curitiba, a cidade do ecossistema de inovação Vale do Pinhão. Esse será o primeiro desse ano e a *43ª edição do maior encontro de negócios do Vale do Pinhão.

📢Venha participar conosco! Amplie sua rede de contatos, compartilhe experiências e descubra novas oportunidades de negócios.

Você poderá se inscrever para fazer seu *pitch de negócios🗣️👥👥*, participar do *open mic🎙️* ou *divulgar eventos e oportunidades*.

Nessa edição, teremos o *Pitch Walk🎤🤩*, uma pocket palestra com o consultor _Alan Reinaldin_, da Reinaldin Consultoria, que abordará uma temática muito importante para quem trabalha com inovação: "Como se vender".  

 

*Conecte-se e sinta a energia do Vale do Pinhão, o nosso ecossistema de inovação de Curitiba.*

__________________________

O Business Round é um evento da Agência Curitiba de Desenvolvimento e Inovação que tem o objetivo de promover negócios e networking em um clima informal e divertido. O evento é gratuito e reúne representantes de startups, investidores, empresários, pesquisadores, estudantes, gestores públicos e interessados em negócios de tecnologia e inovação.

FAÇA A SUA INSCRIÇÃO AQUI!!

entry.title: SCC - Shadow attempts to authorize itself unintentionally with a certificate
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently trying to configure the High Availability Setup between our SAP Cloud Connector.

LDAP is set up on both the master and the shadow. Accordingly, the shadow should also authorize itself with username and password on the master.

However, when I try to establish the connection, an error occurs. Here is the LOG from the shadow.

Spoiler
2025-02-06 14:14:08,426 +0100#INFO#org.apache.catalina.core.ContainerBase.[Catalina]#https-jsse-nio2-8443-exec-1# #Exception performing authentication. Retrying... javax.naming.CommunicationException: Connection reset at com.sun.jndi.ldap.LdapCtx.doSearch(LdapCtx.java:2031) at com.sun.jndi.ldap.LdapCtx.searchAux(LdapCtx.java:1873) at com.sun.jndi.ldap.LdapCtx.c_search(LdapCtx.java:1798) at com.sun.jndi.toolkit.ctx.ComponentDirContext.p_search(ComponentDirContext.java:392) at com.sun.jndi.toolkit.ctx.PartialCompositeDirContext.search(PartialCompositeDirContext.java:358) at com.sun.jndi.toolkit.ctx.PartialCompositeDirContext.search(PartialCompositeDirContext.java:341) at javax.naming.directory.InitialDirContext.search(InitialDirContext.java:267) at org.apache.catalina.realm.JNDIRealm.getUserBySearch(JNDIRealm.java:1677) at org.apache.catalina.realm.JNDIRealm.getUser(JNDIRealm.java:1512) at org.apache.catalina.realm.JNDIRealm.getUser(JNDIRealm.java:1462) at org.apache.catalina.realm.JNDIRealm.authenticate(JNDIRealm.java:1279) at org.apache.catalina.realm.JNDIRealm.authenticate(JNDIRealm.java:1159) at com.sap.scc.tomcat.multildap.PositionAwareCombinedRealm.authenticate(PositionAwareCombinedRealm.java:62) at com.sap.scc.tomcat.multildap.PositionAwareLockOutRealm.authenticate(PositionAwareLockOutRealm.java:103) at org.apache.catalina.authenticator.FormAuthenticator.doAuthenticate(FormAuthenticator.java:269) at com.sap.scc.tomcat.valve.SccMultiportAuthenticator$MyFormAuthenticator.doAuthenticate(SccMultiportAuthenticator.java:298) at com.sap.scc.tomcat.valve.SccMultiportAuthenticator.doAuthenticate(SccMultiportAuthenticator.java:152) at org.apache.catalina.authenticator.AuthenticatorBase.invoke(AuthenticatorBase.java:563) at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardHostValve.invoke(StandardHostValve.java:130) at org.apache.catalina.valves.AbstractAccessLogValve.invoke(AbstractAccessLogValve.java:660) at com.sap.js.statistics.tomcat.valve.RequestTracingValve.callNextValve(RequestTracingValve.java:113) at com.sap.js.statistics.tomcat.valve.RequestTracingValve.invoke(RequestTracingValve.java:59) at com.sap.core.js.monitoring.tomcat.valve.RequestTracingValve.invoke(RequestTracingValve.java:27) at org.apache.catalina.valves.ErrorReportValve.invoke(ErrorReportValve.java:93) at org.apache.catalina.core.StandardEngineValve.invoke(StandardEngineValve.java:74) at org.apache.catalina.connector.CoyoteAdapter.service(CoyoteAdapter.java:346) at org.apache.coyote.http11.Http11Processor.service(Http11Processor.java:383) at org.apache.coyote.AbstractProcessorLight.process(AbstractProcessorLight.java:63) at org.apache.coyote.AbstractProtocol$ConnectionHandler.process(AbstractProtocol.java:937) at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.Nio2Endpoint$SocketProcessor.doRun(Nio2Endpoint.java:1734) at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.SocketProcessorBase.run(SocketProcessorBase.java:52) at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.AbstractEndpoint.processSocket(AbstractEndpoint.java:1335) at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.Nio2Endpoint$Nio2SocketWrapper$2.completed(Nio2Endpoint.java:645) at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.Nio2Endpoint$Nio2SocketWrapper$2.completed(Nio2Endpoint.java:621) at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.SecureNio2Channel$1.completed(SecureNio2Channel.java:1026) at org.apache.tomcat.util.net.SecureNio2Channel$1.completed(SecureNio2Channel.java:949) at sun.nio.ch.Invoker.invokeUnchecked(Invoker.java:126) at sun.nio.ch.Invoker$2.run(Invoker.java:218) at sun.nio.ch.AsynchronousChannelGroupImpl$1.run(AsynchronousChannelGroupImpl.java:112) at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1190) at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:659) at org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.TaskThread$WrappingRunnable.run(TaskThread.java:63) at java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:838) Caused by: java.net.SocketException: Connection reset at java.net.SocketInputStream.read(SocketInputStream.java:210) at java.net.SocketInputStream.read(SocketInputStream.java:141) at sun.security.ssl.SSLSocketInputRecord.read(SSLSocketInputRecord.java:475) at sun.security.ssl.SSLSocketInputRecord.readHeader(SSLSocketInputRecord.java:469) at sun.security.ssl.SSLSocketInputRecord.bytesInCompletePacket(SSLSocketInputRecord.java:69) at sun.security.ssl.SSLSocketImpl.readApplicationRecord(SSLSocketImpl.java:1333) at sun.security.ssl.SSLSocketImpl.access$300(SSLSocketImpl.java:76) at sun.security.ssl.SSLSocketImpl$AppInputStream.read(SSLSocketImpl.java:979) at java.io.BufferedInputStream.fill(BufferedInputStream.java:246) at java.io.BufferedInputStream.read1(BufferedInputStream.java:286) at java.io.BufferedInputStream.read(BufferedInputStream.java:345) at com.sun.jndi.ldap.Connection.run(Connection.java:946) ... 1 common frames omitted 2025-02-06 14:14:11,030 +0100#INFO#com.sap.scc.ha#https-jsse-nio2-8443-exec-4# #Shadow 27up0t9m: Start thread 'Ping To Master' 2025-02-06 14:14:11,030 +0100#INFO#com.sap.scc.ha#com.sap.scc.ha.PingToMaster# #Shadow 27up0t9m: PingToMaster started 2025-02-06 14:14:11,108 +0100#ERROR#com.sap.scc.ha#com.sap.scc.ha.PingToMaster# #Shadow 27up0t9m: get master version failed with An internal error occurred. See 'Log And Trace Files' and in particular scc_core.trc for details. Associated entries were logged on or around 2025-02-06 14:14:11,108 +0100. com.sap.scc.ha.HaHttpClientException: request https://HOSTNAME:8443/ failed with 401 ()

But what puzzles me the most is this part:

Spoiler
<!DOCTYPE html> <html> <head> <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge" /> <title>Cloud Connector</title> <script src="/resources/sap-ui-core.js" type="application/javascript" data-sap-ui-theme="sap_fiori_3"></script> <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="/notification.css"> <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="/info_css.jsp"> </head> <body class="sapUiBody sapUiSizeCompact"> <div id="infoDivPos"><div id="infoDiv"><h1>You are on  Cloud Connector - TEST instance </h1><br> Please use your Windows Username and Password to login</div></div> <div class="content"> <div class="valigned"> <img id="alertIcon" width="64" height="64" title="Warning" alt="Warning" src="data:image/png;base64,"> <p class="centerText largeText"> Logon with client certificate failed </p> <p class="centerText"> Consult documentation or your Cloud Connector administrator </p> <a href="https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/logon-to-cloud-connector-via-client-certificate"> <img id="infoIcon" title="Go to documentation"

This reads to me as if the shadow is trying to authenticate itself using a certificate, although it is actually supposed to use the specified user and LDAP.

Do you have any ideas on how I can proceed here? This has been bothering me for a while and I'm slowly running out of ideas.

Many thanks and best regards!

entry.title: Purchase order Quantity: Multiple of Fixed Amount
entry.content:
Hello there, SAP Community,

I’d like to configure Material master data for fixed purchase quantity.

I have a material that is sold in fixed multiples of 1000.

So, when I (Manually or MRP) create a purchase requisition/order, only multiples of 1000 are allowed as purchasable quantities. Also, the minimum purchasable quantity is 2000 units. So, if the MRP requires 1001 units, a purchase order for 2000 units will be created.

Allowed: 2000, 3000, 4000, ...

Not Allowed: e.g., 500, 1500, 1111 ... 

Where can I configure this behavior?

Can this also be controlled for manually created purchase requisitions and purchase orders?

Kind regards,
Philipp

entry.title: Re: List Report Controller Extension - custom button plus...
entry.content:
Hi @Marian_Zeis 

I did use Fiori Tools (Guided dev) to create my custom action. It updated my manifest and created the controller like this:

 

sap.ui.define([
  "sap/m/MessageToast"
], function(MessageToast) {
  "use strict";

  return { 
      scanMe: function(oEvent) {
          MessageToast.show("Custom handler invoked.");
          ...

 

But that doesn't allow overriding hook methods. And there are no guided tools to extend base controller.

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud - Reset QM task status
entry.content:
Hi,

maybe some more details. 
As Matt mentioned functionality is hidden in public cloud means in apps for Quality Notification corresponding button is not visible and in apps for Tasks of Quality Notifications entry in menu is greyed out.

Currently there are no concrete plans to offer this in public cloud.

As an alternative you may check functionality offered for Defects and QualityTasks.
If that does not fit and you need this "re-open" feature you may check note   2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to get this validated.

Regards,
   Udo

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP Web API - Modify response body
entry.content: May i know how you did this , I also have same requirement with unmanaged scenario but when i am trying to add ?$select=FieldName in my post query it is giving me problem that The Data Services Request contains SystemQueryOptions that are not allowed for this Request Type

entry.title: Re: How to derive the cost centre in the foreign currency valuation
entry.content: afroz_ahmed4, have you found a solution?

entry.title: Re: CCM - Statistical price condition in delta accruals
entry.content:
To resolve this issue, follow these steps:

1. Manually Assign the Accrual Flag – Modify the pricing procedure to ensure that RED1 is flagged as an accrual condition or replace it with REA1 (which has the accrual flag).
2. Adjust Account Key in Pricing – Ensure the account key assigned to RED1 or RED2 correctly maps to the accrual account in OBYC.
3. Override Account Determination – Use User Exit EXIT_SAPLV60B_008 to force the correct accrual account assignment during FI posting.
4. Check Statistical Condition Behavior – If necessary, test with RED1 as non-statistical to confirm if FI posting occurs.
5. Debug FI Document Creation – Use Transaction VBREVE to analyze why no FI document appears.

For additional details, refer to [SAP Note 2826092](https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2826092) (Accrual Condition Handling in Settlement).

entry.title: V51vp - item was not found - process cancelled during goods issue
entry.content:
When trying to process the IDOC, this error comes up. But only in the system where upgrade happened. The quality system seems to be fine.

When trying to process the IDOC for PGI I get the below error.

 

V51VP - item was not found - process cancelled

Message No. HUGENERAL056

entry.title: Re: Fiori Launchpad Plugin - attach logic after page has been rendered
entry.content: you'd better state your original business requirement/scenario instead of your technical design/imgination

entry.title: Re: How to kill user session in sap bo rest api?
entry.content:
I checked the Platform REST API docs and I don't believe it's possible with the REST API.

A while back I created a Java program object to do this, because we had a big problem with sessions not being closed.  You might be able to adapt it to your needs.  The heart of the code is:

		long minsThreshold;
		try
		{
			minsThreshold = Long.parseLong(args[0]) * 60;
		}
		catch (NumberFormatException nfe)
		{
			throw new Exception("Invalid value in arguments -- expected integer specifying number of hours for purge: " + args[0]);
		}
		
		System.out.println("Threshhold is: " + minsThreshold);
		
		
		IInfoObjects boInfoObjects = oInfoStore.query("select si_id, si_name, si_creation_time,si_cuid from ci_systemobjects where si_kind='Connection' and si_parentid=41 and si_name not in ('QaaWSServletPrincipal','System Account') and SI_AUTHEN_METHOD != 'server-token' and SI_FAILOVER_AVAILABLE_UNTIL is null");
		for (int i = 0; i < boInfoObjects.size(); i++)
		{
			IInfoObject io = (IInfoObject) boInfoObjects.get(i);
			IProperties properties = io.properties();
			String siName = io.getTitle();
			Date dateCreate = properties.getDate("SI_CREATION_TIME");

			if(!userInfos.containsKey(siName))
				userInfos.put(siName, new UserInfo(siName));
			
			try
			{
				Date dateNow = new Date();
				if (dateCreate.getTime() < dateNow.getTime())
				{
					long differenceInMilliSecs = dateNow.getTime() - dateCreate.getTime();
					long differenceInMins = differenceInMilliSecs / 1000L / 60L;
					if (differenceInMins >= (long) minsThreshold)
					{
						userInfos.get(siName).addSession(dateCreate);
						System.out.println("Deleting session for user: " + siName + ", created: " + sdf.format(dateCreate) + ", session CUID: " + io.getCUID());
						boInfoObjects.delete(io);
						delCount++;
					} 
				}
			}
			catch (Exception e)
			{
				System.out.println("Error killing session: " + e.getMessage());
			}
			
		}
		
		oInfoStore.commit(boInfoObjects);
		System.out.println("Deleted " + delCount + " sessions.");		

		for(UserInfo userInfo : userInfos.values())
			if(userInfo.getSessionCount() > 0 )
				System.out.println(userInfo.format());

entry.title: Re: List Report Controller Extension - custom button plus...
entry.content: @RaminSyes, you´re right, but with the Page Map you can creater controller extension, hier you can create a different file for the controller extension, now you have two files, one for the controller extension and one for the custom action

entry.title: Re: Duplicate plan order orders for same sales order line...
entry.content:
Hello

It is difficult to tell without knowing the details. 
Can you please share a screenshot of MD04?

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP PostgreSQL Database import to pgAdmin with SSH Tunnel (Local Access)
entry.content:
Hello @mertuytun  I am struck at Step 6 'Open SSH tunnel'. 

foo@bar:~$ cf ssh -L localhost:<--localport-->:<--remotehost-ip-->:<--remoteport--> <--app name--> -N

To frame the above code, Where can I check 'remotehost-ip' & port details of my PostgreSQLDB. 

and in place of local host can I use simply as 'localhost:2641' or Do I need to replace it with my local host IP? and the port 2641 is default for any local host in general? Kindly clarify.

Thanks

Delli

entry.title: Re: How Disable Purchase requisition creation when a mate...
entry.content:
Hello

In the order type dependent parameters customizing (OPL8) there is a setting which allows you to control when purchase requisitions will be created from production orders.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: TM in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi @senthil0310 ,

There is no so-called full blown TM in the Public Cloud. However, depending on what you want to achieve, you might be able to use the Public Cloud for your scenarios.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: V51vp - item was not found - process cancelled during goods issue
entry.content: Tell us what you have tried among the existing solutions and SAP notes, and what were the results: https://www.google.com/search?q=V51VP+-+item+was+not+found+-+process+cancelled+Message+No.+HUGENERAL056%20site:sap.com

entry.title: Re: Not Able to update Sales Pricing Data Dynamically for Different Pricing Conditions
entry.content:
Hi Bupendra,

We have implemented similar thing recently and it did work for us. Could you please make sure filters in implementation attributes of custom logic and configuration in CBC is linked correctly.

entry.title: Re: V51vp - item was not found - process cancelled during...
entry.content:
There is even a KBA 2717943 - Error messages "item &1 does not exist" or "Enter batch" are shown in ERP SMQ2 in a queue triggered from EWM didn't you find any relevant OSS note?

" But only in the system where upgrade happened.

Did you actually upgrade productive system but not quality system before?

entry.title: Re: V51vp - item was not found - process cancelled during goods issue
entry.content:
@Sandra_Rossi, checked the SDN thoroughly , the charg , werks and lgort looks okay. Item category is relevant for packing.

Item numbers match. Still get the error.

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)

Hello Dolores,

what a masterpiece article we got here from you !

Thank you for sharing!

Kind Regards,

Jorge

entry.title: Not able to add a subaccount in the Cloud connector
entry.content:
I am trying to add a subaccount in Cloud Connector to integrate my on-prem S/4 Hana system with BTP and I have the P-User ID even though I am giving proper details It is through the following error 

An authorization problem occurred when downloading the configuration. Check the spelling of the subaccount name, user, and password or the validity of the authentication data. See 'Log And Trace Files' and in particular scc_core.trc for details. Associated entries were logged on or around 2025-02-06 19:10:55,506 +0530. Consult SAP note 2571763 for possible remedies.

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Polish SAF-...
entry.content:
Hello Heike,

please check the Document and Reporting Compliance Help Page link for S/4 Public Cloud:

https://help.sap.com/viewer/3b2c091e13434f9ab2fb53d147ba5e9f/LATEST/en-US/097165e9c1074038847625e5c53e07d2.html

If your search for Poland you will see that SAF-T is indeed covered. It does of course require the matching DRC license, please contact the SAP Account Team.

entry.title: How to display more than 60 measures in R script in SAP Analytics Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello SAC Community!

I'm using R in SAP Analytics Cloud and noticed a limit of 60 measures in a script. Is there a way to bypass this restriction to display more measures?

Thanks!

Adam

entry.title: Can I configure an external or third-party SFTP server in SAP SuccessFactors Integration Center
entry.content:
Can I configure an external or third-party SFTP server in SAP SuccessFactors Integration Center to schedule a job for importing or exporting the Talent Intelligence Hub Attributes Library?

We are trying to schedule a job in Integration Center using an Azure Blob Storage-based SFTP server, but we are unable to establish a connection.

 Also we tried few others server as well and we faced the same issue.

We have created SFTP server as mentioned at https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/storage/blobs/secure-file-transfer-protocol-support

entry.title: Re: LE-WM using scan to count a Product during a TO confi...
entry.content:
Hello @Miguel_Nava 

I implemented a similar scenario for a telecommunication company. It was used during SIM cards picking. That was several years ago, in the times of physical SIMs. It was on LE-WM in ECC. It worked like a charm. 

If this is a valid business requirement then I think you should go ahead and implement it. You will not have much more transactions, but dialog steps, as each scan needs to be processed with a dialog step, but it doesn't have to save anything in the database. 

In my opinion hardware sizing should be adjusted to accommodate valid business requirements.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA best practices on private or on-premises
entry.content:
for best practices you will need an S-User account then you can review them here for s/4 HANA Private or public - there is no charge to review the process flows you just need access to an S-user account from you company for instance.

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator

 

Thank you

Joseph

entry.title: Magento 2.7 to SAP Integration
entry.content: Does the Magento 2.0 OpenConnector also support Magento 2.7 integration? Have you gained experience with such integration scenarios from Adobe Commerce to SAP?

entry.title: Re: Upgrade SAP B1 Client v9.2 PL03 to v9.3 PL14 error
entry.content:
Dear jindonguyen

Please try following workarounds from attached SAP Note:"2289483":

Let us know is still having same issue.

Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Purchase Requisitions in the project
entry.content:
In project, purchase requisition can be created as

- 1 Purchase requisition per project i.e. 1 PR for all the networks

- Multiple purchase requisitions per project i.e. 1 PR per network or PR per material line item added in the project. 

- PR by collective indicators 

However, in my project we are assigning BOM material as well as locally procured materials to the network activities and one per is getting created with different line items underneath.  I need separate PR for BOM materials and separate PR for locally procured materials. Can we achieve this though SAP standards. 

Regards 

K

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One - RSP Backup Failed Due to HANA Fold...
entry.content:
Hi PARAGMewada 

Please check SAP note 2442129 

KInd Regards
Nidhi Singh

entry.title: Technical Questions for S/4HANA RISE PCE
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I have some questions regarding S/4HANA RISE PCE landscape on AWS for a Greenfield Implementation.

Q1. Client wants to have separate subnets for DEV, QA and Production environments. Please confirm if this can be implemented on RISE and has no technical implications or risks

Q2. Client wants to clarify if /22 is sufficient to accommodate both Prod and SDDR. If /22 is not sufficient then can /21 range be used for Prod and SDDR subnet? Will there be any technical implications or risk associated with this range?

Q3. Client has 2 DNS Servers with different domains and both having Primary and Secondary IP's running in their landscape. They want to get all the DNS server entries added into RISE DNS. Can multiple DNS IP-addresses for the client can be added to RISE DNS

Q4. The general timelines for RISE provisioning is 23 days. By how many days thew timelines will extend in following conditions:
. SDDR
. 21 Languages to be installed
. BP Activation
. 1 additional client 120 in the DEV box (other than 050,100,110)

Q5. As part of IBP provisioning a cloud CI-DS service will be given as default or do we need to select CPI-DS instances separately under Additional Solutions in COF?

Q6. SAP standard document recommends SAC Agent to run on same host Cloud Connector. In case of our client SAC Agent will be installed on the same host as Cloud connector or on a separate EC2 instance in RISE?

Q7. If a RISE provisioned instance(for example SAC agent) is not in use, can the instance remain shutdown and will it incur cost if not used?

Q8. In COF there was no option for Cloud Connector HA under S/4HANA EM while adding Solution. Will the Cloud connector HA be provisioned as a default as part of the landscape?

Q9. Based on FUE sizing the size selected for RISE S/4HANA PCE is S. If during the project there is a requirement to uplift the sizing to M or L, etc based on Quick Sizer report and performance requirements, is it easy to uplift the systems to bigger instances? Are there any restrictions and will there be significant impact on cost?

entry.title: Does BADI MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA still work with MRP live?
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

I would like to know if BADI MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA still works with MRP live (S/4 HANA).

If not, is there a new one that makes the job for considering consignment stock?

Thank you all.

entry.title: Re: Add Button in Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi ramco1917 

Please check below thread:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/sales-order-form-add-button-how-to-prevent-order-submission/qaq-p/10055433

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: Receiving 997 functional acknowledgement in SAP with...
entry.content: hi marcos , no we are using the TPM framework it does not offer this functionality as of now , neither any custom exit to route this aknowledgement

entry.title: How to filter for CFIN replication
entry.content:
For the CFIN_ACCHD, AUFK and COBK tables there are specific document types, company codes and transaction types that aren't needed, how to filter the data?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to filter for CFIN replication
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

The KBA 2874290 - "How to apply filters in CFIN replication scenario? - SAP Landscape Transformation Replication Server" covers filtering for CFIN replications.

 

Best Regards,
Michael
SAP Support 
Available Time: CST 07:00 - 15:30

entry.title: Re: Add Button in Sales Order
entry.content: Hi, i want to add button on any Form. Connection is o.k. Can you please help with sample code.

entry.title: Select delivery documents by creation date
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to select deliveries based on the following criteria via class /scwm/cl_dlv_management_prd and method query:

  • DOCCAT: PDO
  • ITEMTYPE: ODTS
  • Creation Date: Given Range selected by the user 

My code looks like this:

Selection table:

No documents are found if selection criteria for creation date (CRETST_H) is included. If I remove this then a document is found (with CRETST in the given range):

What am I doing wrong?

 

Best regards,

Tim

entry.title: Re: The detail on alerts disapears after opening the documents on the detail
entry.content: Could you reproduce this issue with demo database also?
